title: Dendrobium obyrnei
taxonomy: Dendrobium obyrnei is classified as an orchid species, specifically belonging to the genus Dendrobium and the family Orchidaceae. This classification is based on its physical characteristics and genetic traits that are unique to the Dendrobium genus. The Dendrobium genus is further divided into several subgenera, with Dendrobium obyrnei being one of the many species within it. The Orchidaceae family is a diverse group of flowering plants that includes over 30,000 known species, making it one of the largest and most widespread plant families in the world. Through its classification, Dendrobium obyrnei can be identified and distinguished from other orchid species.

The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which may contribute to its medicinal uses.
